title: Why Shares of Align Technology Fell Thursday
text: Invisalign's revenue improved sequentially but was still down year over year. Net income was up sequentially but down 21% year over year because of increased expenses.

title: Align Technology (ALGN) Q1 Earnings Beat, Margins Contract
text: Align Technology (ALGN) delivers better-than-expected revenues and earnings in the first quarter of 2023 but suffers significant foreign currency woes.

title: These 2 Stocks Moved the Nasdaq After Hours
text: Stocks were mixed, with the Nasdaq rising on Wednesday, even as other benchmarks fell. Meta Platforms stock soared after hours on solid earnings performance.

title: Align Technology (ALGN) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Align Technology (ALGN) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.82 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.69 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.13 per share a year ago.

title: Invisalign maker Align Tech stock falls more than 5% after Q1 earnings
text: Shares of Align Technology Inc. ALGN dropped more than 5% in the extended session Wednesday despite a beat for the maker of Invisalign orthodontic braces and other medical devices. Align earned $88 million, or $1.14 a share, in the first quarter, compared with $134.3 million, or $1.70 a share, in the year-ago quarter.

title: Should You Buy Align Technology (ALGN) Ahead of Earnings?
text: Align Technology (ALGN) is seeing favorable earnings estimate revision activity and has a positive Zacks Earnings ESP heading into earnings season.

title: 2 Must-Own Stocks to Supercharge Your Portfolio
text: If you aren't investing in stocks that will grow, your portfolio might lose ground. Align Technology has a great product-market fit, and new markets to penetrate.

title: 5 U.S. Corporate Bigwigs Set to Beat on Q1 Earnings Next Week
text: We have narrowed our search to five U.S. corporate bigwigs that are set to report first-quarter 2023 earnings results next week. These are: GE, KMB, GLW, RTX and ALGN.

title: Align Technology (ALGN) to Post Q1 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Align Technology's (ALGN) first-quarter 2023 results are likely to witness impressive performance across its operating segments amid macroeconomic pressure.

title: Is the Options Market Predicting a Spike in Align Technology (ALGN) Stock?
text: Investors need to pay close attention to Align Technology (ALGN) stock based on the movements in the options market lately.

title: What Factors Will Drive S&P 500 Performance This Year?
text: Many investors feel a sense of relief after the broad markets rebounded in the first quarter. Some even have a  growing sense of optimism as index-tracking exchange-traded funds like the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSEARCA: SPY), Invesco QQQ ETF (NASDAQ: QQQ), and the SPDR Dow Jones Industrial Average ETF Trust (NYSEARCA: DIA) posted gains.
